description: CompositionPurple leggings made of 95% cotton and 5% spandex, has an elasticated waist and embroidered branding on the left below the waistFitSlim-fitWash careMachine wash cold with like colours below 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not bleachLine dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsStylish and in-vogue, the design team from nike have added a hint of retro chic to this contemporary essential. The luxe, stretchy fabric is designed to fit to your shape, making sure every day is perfect for leggings. Style this in so many ways - with a white shirt-dress and clunky heels, with a tunic and belt or with a long top and sneakers for your workouts.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of waist 26” and hips 36”
